status_summary: Amber because execution risk, milestone risk are driving the highest weighted pressure.
reasons: The project has 1 critical blockers and 3 unresolved issues.
33% of milestones are marked delayed and 67% are overdue as of 2026-07-07.
recommendations: Run a daily blocker and issue review until the open execution queue drops materially.
Turn delayed milestones into a dated recovery plan with explicit checkpoint owners.
Re-baseline overdue work and assign owners for the next two milestone dates.
assumptions: Used the workbook's project summary row as the primary source of truth for current-state metrics.
Did not use the provided RAG column as an input; treated it only as an optional validation reference.
